name: KYC — Individual (India)
description: Standard KYC document verification for individual customer onboarding in India. Covers PAN, Aadhaar, and address proof validation with cross-document consistency checks.

documentTypes.label: PAN Card
documentTypes.extractionPrompt: This is an Indian Permanent Account Number (PAN) card issued by the Income Tax Department. Extract the PAN number, full name, father's name, date of birth, and photograph presence.

expectedFields.name: full_name
expectedFields.label: Full Name
expectedFields.description: Name as printed on the PAN card

documentTypes.label: Aadhaar Card
documentTypes.extractionPrompt: This is an Indian Aadhaar card issued by UIDAI. Extract the Aadhaar number, full name, date of birth, gender, and address.

documentTypes.label: Address Proof
documentTypes.extractionPrompt: This is an address proof document (utility bill, bank statement, or rent agreement). Extract the name, address, document date, and document type.

expectedFields.name: document_date
expectedFields.label: Document Date
expectedFields.description: Date of issue or statement date

documentTypes.label: Passport-size Photograph
documentTypes.extractionPrompt: This should be a passport-size photograph. Check if it contains a clear face, is recent-looking, and meets basic photo ID standards.

crossDocRules.description: Name on PAN card must match name on Aadhaar card
Date of birth on PAN must match Aadhaar
Name on Aadhaar must match name on address proof
Address on Aadhaar should be consistent with address proof. Check if they refer to the same location even if formatting differs.

promptConfig.systemPrompt: You are a document verification specialist for Indian KYC (Know Your Customer) compliance. You extract structured data from identity and address documents with high accuracy. Always normalize names to title case, dates to DD/MM/YYYY, and addresses to a consistent format. Flag any signs of tampering, poor quality, or inconsistency.
promptConfig.extractionInstructions: For each document, extract all requested fields precisely as they appear. If a field is not visible or illegible, set its value to null and note the issue in anomalies. Pay special attention to: (1) matching names exactly as printed, (2) correct date formats, (3) complete addresses including PIN code, (4) document validity and recency.
